description: Custom packages in overlays/pkg/local/ inconsistently use runHook in install phases. wezterm-config.nix, emacs-config.nix, emacs-vanilla-config.nix skip runHook pre/postInstall, while mdloader.nix, myrient-downloader.nix, m3ugen.nix use them properly. Add runHook preInstall/postInstall to all packages for consistency and extensibility.
title: Consistent runHook usage in custom package installPhases
